title: Zone Logic Profile
description: Schema for `zone.logic_profile` namespace. Simplified v1 — covers only the structural invariants currently enforced by AutomationConfigRegistry::validateLogicProfilePayload. Deep subsystem validation is intentionally loose pending dedicated subsystem schemas (climate, irrigation, lighting).

active_mode.description: Currently active profile key; must exist in `profiles` when not null. Allowed modes come from ZoneLogicProfileCatalog::allowedModes() and are not hardcoded here.

profiles.description: Map of mode key => profile config. Key format enforced by business layer.

Profile.description: Profile config. Open shape in v1 — backend writes lifecycle metadata (mode, is_active, created_at/by, updated_at/by, command_plans) alongside `subsystems`. Structural validation done at subsystem level (separate schemas to be added).

subsystems.description: Per-subsystem configuration. Structure loose in v1 — each subsystem owns its own sub-schema (to be added).
